narrative:
Crawford County has 27,225 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.4% of registrants.
